summary: Route path tracing line animation map component for Remotion.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/map-path-trace/src/MapPathTrace.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `MapPathTrace` and `mapPathTraceDefaultProps`, then register the `MapPathTrace` composition with duration 120, fps 30, width 1920, and height 1080.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Map Path Trace Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/map-path-trace to my project. Preserve the exported MapPathTraceProps API and register the MapPathTrace composition with the default props.
